title: mangifera quadrifida var. spathulifolia
intro: Mangifera quadrifida var. spathulifolia, also known as the Philippine mango tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines, characterized by its unique properties and medicinal uses. The plant's extracts have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Mangifera quadrifida var. spathulifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
